canonical_answer: A large white bowl holds three oranges, two green limes, and fresh green herbs at the top center. Below it, five small white bowls contain peeled garlic cloves, yellow liquid, brown powder, dried herbs, and a salt mixture. White text listing specific measurements overlays the right side of the wooden table surface.

question: Describe the visual sequence of title cards and food presentation from the start until the marinade instruction appears.
canonical_answer: At 0s, cooked chicken pieces appear on a white oval plate with 'Rough Diamond Recipes' text; at 6s, the text 'Chicken Mojo' overlays the browned meat; at 10s, vertical black bars appear with red text stating 'First lets make the Mojo marinade'; at 12s, the screen shows only red text on a black background.

question: Describe the layout and specific items visible when the ingredients for the recipe are displayed on screen.
canonical_answer: At 16s, a large white bowl containing three oranges and green limes appears on a wooden table; at 16s, small white bowls filled with garlic cloves and brown powder arrange below; at 18s, white text overlay lists 'Juice of 3 oranges' and 'juice of 2 limes'; at 20s, the shot remains on the ingredients with visible horizontal grain on the surface.
